title: Iran’s attacks on Gulf neighbors cut off food and medicine for millions
summary_full: The war has disrupted shipping routes, raised fuel and insurance prices, closed airports, and left aid groups with tons of essential supplies stuck in warehouses.
summary_public: The war has disrupted shipping routes, raised fuel and insurance prices, closed airports, and left aid groups with tons of essential supplies stuck in warehouses.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s attacks on Gulf neighbors cut off food and medicine for millions
